rules.name: Low Battery Warning
rules.description: Alert when battery drops below 20%

action_params.message: Sir, your battery is running low at {value}%. You should plug in soon.

rules.name: High CPU Usage
rules.description: Alert when CPU usage is high for extended period

action_params.message: Sir, your CPU usage is at {value}%. Something may be consuming excessive resources.

rules.name: Low Disk Space Warning
rules.description: Alert when disk space is below 10%

action_params.message: Sir, your disk is {value}% full. You may want to free up some space.

rules.name: Incomplete Tasks Reminder
rules.description: Remind about tasks left incomplete from previous sessions

action_params.message: Sir, you mentioned working on '{task}' recently. Shall we continue where you left off?

rules.name: Historical Issue Alert
rules.description: Alert when current work matches past issues

action_params.message: Sir, this issue reminds me of '{past_solution}' from your notes. The pattern similarity is {relevance} words. Would you like me to pull up those notes?

rules.name: Project Activity Detection
rules.description: Detect active project work and offer assistance

action_params.message: I see you've been working on {recent_files}. Shall I prepare the development environment or run any tests?

rules.name: Routine Recognition
rules.description: Learn and notify based on user routines

action_params.message: It's your usual {typical_activity} time, Sir. {preparation}

rules.name: Morning Briefing
rules.description: Daily morning summary at 8 AM

action_params.message: Good morning, Sir. Shall we review your projects and tasks for today?

rules.name: Git Uncommitted Changes
rules.description: Remind about uncommitted changes after work session

action_params.message: Sir, you have {modified} modified and {untracked} new files uncommitted. Shall I help you commit these changes?

rules.name: Voice Stress Monitor
rules.description: Analyze interaction patterns for stress indicators

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Predictive Hardware Failure
rules.description: Predict hardware failures before they happen

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Learn From Past Fixes
rules.description: Remember solutions and suggest them preemptively

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Idle Time Suggestions
rules.description: When system idle for 15+ minutes, suggest productive tasks

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Emotional Arc Tracker
rules.description: Track user's emotional state and detect burnout patterns

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Autonomous System Maintenance
rules.description: Silently maintain system health like JARVIS maintaining the lab

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Predictive Environment Preparation
rules.description: Prepare workspace based on learned user patterns

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Suspicious Network Activity
rules.description: Detect unusual network patterns and intrusion attempts

action_params.message: {message}

rules.name: Lab Temperature Alert
rules.description: Monitor system temperature and thermal conditions

action_params.message: Sir, {component} temperature is at {temp}°C. That's above optimal for delicate components.

rules.name: Stress Level Monitor
rules.description: Detect user stress from conversation patterns

action_params.message: You seem {stress_level}, Sir. You've used {frustration} frustration indicators in recent messages. Perhaps a break would help?

rules.name: Workflow Preparation
rules.description: Anticipate next steps in design/development workflow

action_params.message: I see you've created {recent_cad}. Shall I prepare the {next_step} environment?

rules.name: Resource Need Prediction
rules.description: Predict compute/resource needs based on activity

action_params.message: Sir, based on your recent {predicted_task} work with {sim_files} simulation files, I've noted you may need additional processing resources.

rules.name: Autonomous Backup
rules.description: Silently backup files when threshold reached
